---
title: "Home"
---

<style>
#title-block-header {
  display: none;
}
</style>

::: {.hero}
<p class="hero-kicker">Business Analytics · Data Science · E-Portfolio</p>

# Sahil Ashish <span class="accent">Bhattacharya</span>

<p class="hero-lede">Welcome to my e-portfolio, where I showcase my data analytics work through applied projects, technical skills, reflective writing, and professional development as an MSc Business Analytics student.</p>

<div class="hero-actions">
  <a href="projects/">View Portfolio</a>
  <a href="about.html" class="secondary">About Me</a>
</div>
:::

::: {.section}
## Portfolio

<p class="section-intro">Selected MSc work combining analytical thinking, business context, and clear communication.</p>

::: {.portfolio-grid .project-card-grid}
::: {.portfolio-card}
![](images/project-bert.jpg){fig-alt="Abstract visual for NLP sentiment analysis using BERT and generative AI"}

::: {.portfolio-card-content}
### BERT vs Generative AI

A business-focused comparison of transformer fine-tuning and zero-shot LLM workflows for sentiment analysis.

[Read Project](projects/project-bert-genai.html){.card-link}
:::
:::

::: {.portfolio-card}
![](images/project-gorey.jpg){fig-alt="Smart-city traffic and air pollution forecasting visual for Gorey"}

::: {.portfolio-card-content}
### Traffic & Air Pollution Prediction

A smart-city forecasting project using IoT sensor and weather data to support proactive decision-making in Gorey.

[Read Project](projects/project-gorey.html){.card-link}
:::
:::

::: {.portfolio-card}
![](images/project-fai.jpg){fig-alt="Football Association of Ireland CRM and fan lifecycle strategy visual"}

::: {.portfolio-card-content}
### The Fan Growth Engine

A data-driven CRM strategy for improving fan retention and lifecycle engagement in Irish football.

[Read Project](projects/project-fai-crm.html){.card-link}
:::
:::
:::
:::

::: {.section}
## About Me

::: {.profile-panel}
![](images/logo.png){fig-alt="Sahil Bhattacharya logo"}

::: {.profile-copy}
### Sahil Ashish Bhattacharya

I am an MSc Business Analytics student at Dublin City University. My interests include machine learning, natural language processing, CRM analytics, and the communication of data-driven business recommendations.

[Download CV](cv/sahil-bhattacharya-cv.pdf){.button}
:::
:::
:::

::: {.section}
## Skills

::: {.card-grid}
::: {.skill-card}
### Python

Data cleaning, analysis, visualisation, machine learning, and notebook-based experimentation.
:::

::: {.skill-card}
### SQL

Querying, filtering, joining, and preparing relational data for analytics workflows.
:::

::: {.skill-card}
### Power BI

Dashboard thinking, KPI communication, and stakeholder-focused reporting.
:::

::: {.skill-card}
### R

Statistical thinking, reproducible analysis, and data exploration.
:::

::: {.skill-card}
### Excel

Spreadsheet modelling, pivot tables, formulas, and structured business analysis.
:::

::: {.skill-card}
### Web Design

Quarto websites, GitHub Pages, HTML/CSS editing, and portfolio presentation.
:::
:::
:::

::: {.section}
## Media

<p class="section-intro">Space for recorded explainers, presentation walkthroughs, and learning media connected to my analytics work.</p>

::: {.media-grid}
::: {.media-card}
### YouTube Presentation

::: {.media-embed}
YouTube embed placeholder
:::

A short project presentation or portfolio walkthrough can be embedded here.
:::

::: {.media-card}
### Spotify Reflection

::: {.media-embed}
Spotify embed placeholder
:::

An audio reflection, discussion, or learning note can be embedded here.
:::
:::
:::

::: {.section}
## Blogs

::: {.blog-grid}
::: {.blog-card}
### Choosing Between BERT and Generative AI

A short reflection on model selection, workflow constraints, and practical NLP classification.

[Read project](projects/project-bert-genai.html){.card-link}
:::

::: {.blog-card}
### Data Collection Shapes Analysis

What the FAI CRM project taught me about upstream data design and downstream business insight.

[Read project](projects/project-fai-crm.html){.card-link}
:::

::: {.blog-card}
### Building an E-Portfolio with Quarto

How this portfolio helped me practise structured content, version control, and web publishing.

[Read reflection](reflection.html){.card-link}
:::
:::
:::

::: {.section}
## Contact Details

::: {.contact-wrap}
<div class="contact-methods">
<div class="contact-row">
<span class="contact-label">Location</span>
<span>Dublin, Ireland</span>
</div>

<a class="contact-row contact-email" href="mailto:saahil.bhatt30@gmail.com">
<span class="contact-label">Email</span>
<span>saahil.bhatt30@gmail.com</span>
</a>

<div class="social-icon-row" aria-label="Social profile links">
<a class="social-icon-link" href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/sahil-bhattacharya-257924228" target="_blank" rel="noopener" aria-label="LinkedIn profile">
<i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i>
<span>LinkedIn</span>
</a>

<a class="social-icon-link" href="https://github.com/Saahil0206" target="_blank" rel="noopener" aria-label="GitHub profile">
<i class="bi bi-github"></i>
<span>GitHub</span>
</a>
</div>
</div>
:::
:::
